_profile_notes.description: Average German 3-person household in a 120 m² semi-detached house (Cologne). Electricity, gas, mileage and roof size all near national median. Standard 15-year loan at the current market rate.
_profile_notes.heating_kwh: 14,000 kWh gas ≈ 120 m² house, average insulation class C
_profile_notes.roof: 35 m² usable, south-facing, 32° tilt, light shading (0.1) — typical semi-detached
_profile_notes.financing: 15 yr @ 4.5% — average German consumer loan rate 2024
